articles.author: Aaron Kirchfeld, Liana Baker
articles.title: Honeywell Considers Walking Away From Johnson Matthey Catalyst Deal - Bloomberg
articles.description: Honeywell International Inc. is considering walking away from its acquisition of Johnson Matthey Plc’s Catalyst Technologies business, people familiar with the matter said.
articles.content:
Honeywell International Inc. is considering walking away from its acquisition of Johnson Matthey Plcs Catalyst Technologies business, people familiar with the matter said.
